rule.description: DE-AC: Security Assessment - Authentication failure metric collector
DE-AC: Security Assessment - Authentication success
NIST CSF ID.AM: Asset management - SSH authentication success
NIST CSF ID.AM: Asset inventory - New file detected
NIST CSF PR.AC: Access Control - SSH authentication failure
NIST CSF PR.DS: Data Security - File integrity change detected
NIST CSF PR.AC: Access Control - User account modified
NIST CSF DE.CM: Security Monitoring - SSH scan detected
NIST CSF DE.CM: Security Monitoring - Web attack detected
NIST CSF PR.AC: Access Control - SSH invalid/failed login attempt
NIST CSF DE.CM: Security Monitoring - Non-existent user login attempt
NIST CSF PR.AC: Access Control - SSH authentication failed
ISO 27001 A.12.4.1: Event Logging - Syslog received
ISO 27001 A.16.1.5: Incident Management - Rootkit detected
ISO 27001 A.14.2.1: Secure Development - SQL injection attempt
ISO 27001 A.9.4.2: Access Control - PAM authentication failure
ISO 27001 A.12.6.1: Vulnerability Mgmt - Host scan detected
LGPD Art. 46: Security Measures - Suspicious connection detected
LGPD Art. 46: Security Measures - Unauthorized file access
LGPD Art. 49: Data Breach - Data exfiltration attempt
LGPD Art. 49: Data Breach - Sensitive data exposure
LGPD Art. 46: Security Measures - User account creation
MITRE ATTACK T1110: Brute Force - Multiple failed logins
MITRE ATTACK T1014: Rootkit - Stealth malware
MITRE ATTACK T1190: Exploit Public-Facing App - SQL Injection LGPD
NIST CSF RC.RP: Backup executed successfully - RPO checkpoint
NIST CSF RC.RP: Disaster Recovery - Restore executed successfully
NIST CSF PR.DS: Ransomware simulated - Mass file encryption detected
BRUTE FORCE: 30+ failed logins in 5 minutes
